title: ScanResult
description: Output schema for Student Cyber Guardian risk analysis

url.description: The scanned URL (stored locally only, never sent to server)

explanation.description: 1-2 sentence plain-English explanation for the student

examples.explanation: ✅ This page (google.com) passes all basic safety checks. Always stay alert.
tips: Always double-check the URL before entering passwords.
Look for the padlock icon — it means the connection is encrypted.
Be cautious even on safe sites: only download files you were expecting.

examples.explanation: ⚠️ This page is likely dangerous. It triggered 5 risk indicators including: domain looks like a misspelling of paypal and no HTTPS encryption. Do not enter any personal information.

factors.label: No HTTPS encryption
factors.detail: The site doesn't use a secure connection (HTTPS). Your data could be intercepted.

factors.label: Suspicious domain extension
factors.detail: .tk domains are commonly used in spam and phishing campaigns.

factors.label: Domain looks like a misspelling of a real brand
factors.detail: This domain closely resembles "paypal" but isn't the real site.

factors.label: URL or page contains phishing language
factors.detail: The URL path uses language common in phishing attacks.

tips: Close this tab immediately — this page shows multiple signs of being a phishing attack.
If you entered any information, change your passwords for those accounts right away.
Report this site using your browser's 'Report phishing' option to protect others.

examples.explanation: ⚠️ This page is likely dangerous. It triggered 3 risk indicators including: suspicious domain extension and high-pressure urgency language detected. Do not enter any personal information.

factors.label: Suspicious domain extension
factors.detail: .xyz domains are commonly used in spam campaigns.

factors.label: High-pressure / urgency language detected
factors.detail: Phrases like 'act now' are used to pressure you into acting without thinking.

tips: Close this tab immediately — this page shows multiple signs of being a phishing attack.
Real prize winners are never asked to 'confirm' personal information on random sites.
Report this site using your browser's 'Report phishing' option to protect others.

examples._scenario: Suspicious permission request (microphone on news site)
examples.explanation: This site wants to listen through your microphone. It could record your voice.
examples.tip: Only allow mic access for voice/video calls. A news site asking for your microphone is a red flag — deny it.
